title.en: Ye Tian has now entered the Ninth Tribulation R...

content.en:
(Due to the busy days these days, the time is very rushed, the previous chapter wrote the wrong number, and I have asked the editor for permission to modify it!Sorry!)

......

In the Ninth Tribulation area, the difficulty of this level is too great, even His Royal Highness the Invincible Eternal Ancient level does not dare to step into this area, otherwise it will be easy to fall into it.

Ye Tian has now entered the Ninth Tribulation Region, which is very remarkable!

Everyone was very much looking forward to whether Ye Tian would be able to survive the ninth tribulation, and maybe there would be a slight chance to survive the tenth tribulation.

But those who can really break through the tenth tribulation are all His Highnesses above the god level, if Ye Tian can break through the tenth tribulation, it will be against the sky.

"His Highness Tianxuan is in the Seventh Tribulation Region!"

His Highnesses of the Protoss looked at the Seventh Tribulation region.

In the Seventh Tribulation area, His Highness Tianxuan was resisting the Thunder Tribulation, looking a little embarrassed.

With the state of His Royal Highness Tianxuan, there should be no hope of breaking through the tenth tribulation, and it is estimated that he will leave after breaking through the seventh tribulation, otherwise if he continues to break through, there is a danger of falling.

As for His Highness the Blood Wind, at this moment, in the Sixth Tribulation Area of the Ten Tribulation Region, he is slightly behind His Highness Tianxuan, but his strength does not mean that he is lower than His Highness Tianxuan, but he is just breaking through the Supreme Mountain behind, a little slower.

Soon, the projection ended, and the situation on the Supreme Mountain could not be seen clearly.

However, the interval between each projection of the Supreme Mountain is not very long, and they are secretly looking forward to it.

Supreme Mountain, the area of the Seventh Tribulation.

His Highness Tianxuan is fighting against the thunder tribulations in the Seventh Tribulation region with all his might.

After enduring the thunderstorm for a while, His Highness Tianxuan was injured, and his injuries were getting worse and worse.

Finally, all the thunder tribulations in the Seventh Tribulation area descended, and His Highness Tianxuan successfully survived the Seventh Tribulation.

But at this time, he had some heart palpitations.

"No, the Thunder Tribulation of the Seventh Tribulation is so terrifying, and the Eighth Tribulation is even more terrifying, the difficulty is more than twice as difficult, if I enter the Eighth Tribulation area, there is a great possibility of falling!"

Thinking like this, His Royal Highness Tianxuan retreated and began to fly away in the direction of the Supreme Mountain.

He, give up the impact of the tenth calamity!

In fact, he had long known that he was not capable of rushing through the Tenth Tribulation, in the past, among the Eternal Ancient Highnesses of the Emperor of the Protoss, there were also invincible Eternal Ancient Highnesses who were stronger than him, but he still couldn't survive the Tenth Tribulation, why should he?

Knowing that he can't survive the ten tribulations, it would be stupid to go desperately.

He survived the seventh tribulation and exercised himself, and it was not a shame.

His Highness Tianxuan left the Seventh Tribulation area and flew downward.

In the process of going down, there is no need to bear the thunder tribulation and the nine tribulations, almost as soon as he flies by, he easily flies out of the Supreme Mountain.

After His Royal Highness Tianxuan came down to the Supreme Mountain, a group of His Highnesses of the Protoss came to support him.

"What are the results of His Highness the Blood Wind and His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race?"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan asked.

One of the Highnesses of the Protoss hurriedly said, "Your Highness Tianxuan, judging from the recent projection, Your Highness the Blood Wind is in the Sixth Tribulation Region, and Your Highness the Ten Thousand Laws is in the Ninth Tribulation Region. "

"His Highness Wanfa has actually entered the Ninth Tribulation Region!!"

His Highness Tianxuan was shocked.

Although he had broken through the Seventh Tribulation Area, he didn't dare to enter the Eighth Tribulation Area at all, for fear that he would fall and die, and Ye Tian not only broke through the Eighth Tribulation Region, but also dared to step into the Ninth Tribulation Area.

"Hmph, I hope you die in the Ninth Tribulation area!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan secretly looked forward to it.

The Ninth Tribulation area.

At this time, Ye Tian had already endured dozens of thunder tribulations, and there were gradually a lot of wounds on his body.

The ninth tribulation has a total of 256 thunder tribulations, Ye Tian needs to endure 256 thunder tribulations before he can really break through the ninth tribulation, although the difficulty of this level is not as good as the tenth tribulation, but it is still very difficult.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to endure 100 thunder tribulations, and it was not too far away from surviving the ninth tribulation.

One after another thunder tribulations bombarded Ye Tian's body, Ye Tian basically endured these thunder tribulations at the lowest cost, and he didn't dare to spend too much strength to block the thunder tribulation, otherwise if it continued, his strength would be exhausted, and he would really be finished!

Because Ye Tian has a lot of talents like recovery, plus there are a lot of drugs on his body, and more importantly, Ye Tian also has a talent for time.

Here, he used his time talent to speed up 100 times to recover from his injuries, and to recover his injuries as soon as possible before the next lightning tribulation, so that he could maintain his combat effectiveness.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian became more and more dignified, although there was not much left of the Thunder Tribulation, but the power of the Thunder Tribulation was getting stronger and stronger, and the injuries on his body were getting more and more serious.

The 250th Thunder Tribulation!

The 251st Thunder Tribulation!

The 252nd Thunder Tribulation!

......

Ye Tian was fighting bloodily, fighting against these thunderstorms, although he was very embarrassed and his injuries were not light, but in fact, his combat effectiveness still did not decrease much.

Finally, the 256th Thunder Tribulation came.

Ye Tian controlled a large number of Mixed Yuan Vines to stop this last Thunder Tribulation, although all the Mixed Yuan Vines were shattered by the last Thunder Tribulation, most of the power of the last Thunder Tribulation was defeated by Ye Tian's Heavenly Moon Knife with a single blow.

Although the rest of the attack still hit Ye Tian's body, it only blasted Ye Tian into the ground, and did not really hit Ye Tian hard.

"Broke through!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, in a very good mood.

Walking out of the Ninth Tribulation area, before entering the Tenth Tribulation Area, Ye Tian recovered all the injuries on his body as quickly as possible, and immediately walked into the Tenth Tribulation Area.

This area is also the last level, once he has passed it, Ye Tian can be regarded as having passed the three calamities, nine tribulations and ten tribulations, and he can enter the Ten Tribulations Palace and obtain a inheritance that is extremely important to all human beings.

At that time, the human race will inevitably become stronger.

Therefore, this level is extremely important, not only for Ye Tian, but also for the human race, it is a huge turning point.

And when Ye Tian officially entered the tenth tribulation of the Supreme Mountain, a golden light radiated from the Supreme Mountain, attracting the attention of all His Highnesses.

Then, a picture was presented, only showing the situation of the tenth tribulation, and only radiating the picture for Ye Tian alone.

"That's the Tenth Tribulation Zone!"

All His Highnesses were stunned.

His Highness the White Blade and His Highness the Holy Heaven of the Human Race were dumbfounded.

That was the Tenth Tribulation Area, Ye Tian actually dared to enter there, but did he know that even His Highness the Blood Wind and His Highness Tianxuan of the Protoss had withdrawn one by one?

"His Highness Wanfa is too bold, that's the Tenth Tribulation Region!"

His White Blade's pupils shrank sharply, and he was extremely frightened.

With Ye Tian's strength to break into the Tenth Tribulation Region, he knew that the gap between his strength and Ye Tian was getting bigger and bigger.

At the beginning, although he was weaker than Ye Tian, it was difficult for Ye Tian to kill him, but now, Ye Tian estimated that he could easily kill him.

"With such a fast growth rate, he may have a chance to become a Supreme Highness!"

His Highness the White Blade commented.

As for whether he can become a supreme-level highness, he really doesn't have much confidence, after becoming a god-level, it would be good if his first-grade constant-level highness's combat power could not be maintained.

The other side.

His Royal Highness Tianxuan was also dumbfounded.

He was still looking forward to Ye Tian dying in the Ninth Tribulation Area, but he didn't expect that now Ye Tian had broken into the Tenth Tribulation Area, and it had also triggered a vision, allowing Supreme Mountain to project the picture of Ye Tian breaking into the Tenth Tribulation Area, what a glory this was!

There was no doubt that Ye Tian's current record completely crushed him and His Highness the Blood Wind.

"Die, according to the historical records of the Protoss, there is only one Emperor-level Henggu-level Highness who can break through the Tenth Tribulation Area of the Supreme Mountain, and the other invincible-level Henggu-level Highnesses who dare to break through the Tenth Tribulation are all dead. Your Highness Wanfa, no matter how strong you are, you can't break into the Tenth Tribulation, you are doomed!" His Highness Tianxuan said secretly in his heart.

His Highness the Blood Wind was also greatly stimulated, he had never fought against Ye Tian, and had always only regarded His Highness Tianxuan as an opponent.

But now Ye Tian's limelight has completely overshadowed him and His Highness Tianxuan, and he has almost become a well-deserved First Emperor-level Constant-level Highness in the entire universe.

Like His Highness Tianxuan, His Highness Blood Wind also hoped that Ye Tian would fall in the Tenth Tribulation.

Tenth Tribulation Area.

Ye Tian was in full view of everyone and began to welcome the first thunder tribulation of the tenth tribulation.

This level needs to withstand 512 Thunder Tribulations, and the power of each Thunder Tribulation is far greater than the first of the other nine Tribulations.

Rumble!!!!

The huge Pillar of Thunder Tribulation like the Pillar of Optimus bombarded over, and Ye Tian used all his strength to cast the Ten Thousand Realms to try to block the first Thunder Tribulation, and then cast the Mixed Yuan Vine to block the Thunder Tribulation.

Click!!

A heavy barrier was broken, and it was stopped by the mixed element vine, and it was successfully blocked.

But that's just the first thunderstorm!

The thunder tribulations that followed came one by one, bringing huge pressure to Ye Tian.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to endure twenty thunder tribulations, but at this time, his Ten Thousand Heavy Realms had been shattered several times, and it was difficult for him to continue to use this spatial divine power.

And the secret technique of the Mixed Yuan Vine also shattered countless vines, and the consumption of Ye Tian was not small.

Gradually, Ye Tian could only rely on various means to weaken the Thunder Tribulation, and then use his physical body to resist the Thunder Tribulation.

During the fifty-fifth thunder tribulation, Ye Tian vomited a mouthful of blood, and his injuries were not light.

Seeing this scene, several highnesses of the human race became nervous!

This is the fifty-fifth thunder tribulation, there are so many thunder tribulations behind, and the power of the thunder tribulation is getting stronger and stronger, how to fight against this?

"Hahaha, His Highness Wanfa is dead!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan thought in his heart.

His Highnesses of the Protoss, Demons, and other races were also happy to see this scene, and their hearts were filled with joy.

After all, if Ye Tian falls, it will be a good thing for all races!

At the time of the sixtieth thunder tribulation, Ye Tian finally exerted his Five Elements Great Divine Ability-Five Elements Divine Wheel!

The Five Elements Divine Wheel is a great divine power of the five elements, but it also has defensive effects and attack effects, which can be said to be an all-powerful divine power.

The point is that the Great Divine Power has almost no consumption for Ye Tian.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to hide clumsily, but now he had to use it, otherwise if he used the Five Elements Divine Wheel in the back, he would not be able to stop a few thunder tribulations and it would be shattered, so it was better to cast it now to buy himself some time to recover from his injuries.
